title: Mathematical Foundations: From LWE to Kyber
description: Deep dive into the mathematical foundations of ML-KEM, including lattices, LWE problem, and the Kyber construction.
learningObjectives: Understand lattice structures and their properties
Explain the Learning With Errors (LWE) problem
Differentiate between LWE, Ring-LWE, and Module-LWE
Trace the construction from LWE to practical Kyber
Analyze the security assumptions underlying ML-KEM
